summary: Completed frontend testing of CRM/Admin platform for automotive business. Light theme successfully implemented across all pages. Logo, navigation, and core UI elements working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Pages redirect to login after some time, affecting interactive testing

passed_tests: Login page renders with BIBI Cars logo (clean, no square box)
Dashboard renders with light theme (#F7F7F8 background)
Sidebar navigation with Ukrainian labels working
KPI cards display correctly with proper icons and values
All pages accessible: Leads, Customers, Deals, Deposits, Tasks, Staff, Settings
Search input without magnifying glass icon
Light theme consistently applied across all pages
Proper fonts: IBM Plex Sans for body, Cabinet Grotesk for headings
User profile section with logout functionality
